## Review workflow

1. Triage each cluster: **merge** (genuinely one concept → share via `@elizaos/core`), **`extends`/`Pick`/`Omit`** (subset/superset), or **rename** (genuinely distinct concepts that collide by name).
2. Factor high-confidence duplicates by hand — no auto-rewrite. For any removed cast, lower the `type-safety-ratchet` baseline.
3. Record reviewed-but-kept-separate findings in `packages/scripts/type-duplication-audit.allowlist.json` with a written `reason` so re-runs stay low-noise: `name` suppresses a same-name cluster, `pairKey` a subset/near-duplicate pair, `memberKey` a literal-set cluster (the `a|b|c` value key from the report), and `schemaPairKey` a runtime-schema/type pair.
4. Triage guidance + the accepted/rejected family log live in [`packages/scripts/type-duplication-triage.md`](../../packages/scripts/type-duplication-triage.md).
